adapterRun.summary: Environment metadata loaded, but bootstrap is blocked by a missing setup script.
notes: Confirmed the adapter capability supports tool calling, JSON mode, long context, and multi-agent dispatch.
Checked for `scripts/local/*.sh` and found no matching local scripts in this repository checkout.
Ran `sh scripts/local/setup_local_env.sh`, which failed with exit code 127 because the script does not exist.
Ran `npm run validate:synapse-example`, which passed and verified the onboarding configuration files.
No repository source files were modified.

errors.message: Verification command `sh scripts/local/setup_local_env.sh` failed because `scripts/local/setup_local_env.sh` does not exist in the repository checkout.
